Satellite Imagery

Satellite imagery provides high-resolution, real-world visual representation of the Earth's surface.

Characteristics

  • Realistic visual context
  • No labels (in most cases)
  • High detail (buildings, vegetation, water)

Best Use Cases

  • Visual inspection
  • Infrastructure validation
  • Environmental monitoring

Limitations

  • Can be heavy to load
  • Lack of labels
  • Not ideal for dense overlays

Suggested Images

  • Urban satellite view
  • River or floodplain from above

basemap satellite
